subject: FW: Final delivery N908GM S76C++
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, December 07, 2007 2:41 PM
To: Rich Kahn; Lesley Groff; DrJet@tmo.blackberry.net
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; slancaster@bristolassociates.com; Dnrjet@aol.com;
cshurkus@SIKORSKY.COM; sellingsworth@keystonehelicopter.com;
bhjet@tmo.blackberry.net; skellen2@nysgmail.com; Helen Kim;
JETCARE@aol.com; gmax1@ellmax.com
Subject: Final delivery N908GM S76C++


To All: 
Ref: Sikorsky S76C++  N908GM,
I just spoke to Chris Shurkus and Sam Ellingsworth at Sikorsky and the
following is "FIRM".
Bill Togher arrives Thursday the 13th to Keystone to start log book
acceptance and interior completion.
Bill is our S76 outside source of expertise representing us on the
maintenance and record research end.
Darren Rothell and myself will arrive Sunday night Dec. 16th to
Keystone.
Interior and Blade tracking will commence next week, including ground
runs and tracking without interior installed to get a head start and
blade vibrations. 
First completed acceptance flight is Dec. 17th. and we expect to Fly
away from Keystone Dec. 19 as completed and in service.
Rich Kahn, I would expect our insurance to be in place by Dec 10th to
cover our machine, we take full delivery on Dec 17th would be completely
our responsibility, after that date. Final moneys will be at Darren
Indyke's final approval of completion documents.
Darren Indyke, would you be available to join us later Monday the 17th
or Tuesday the 18th for acceptance flights? Chris said he will fwd you
completion docs later in the week for your review.
Thank you,
Larry Visoski

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com]
Sent: Friday, December 07, 2007 2:41 PM
To: Rich Kahn; Lesley Groff; DrJet@tmo.blackberry.net
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; slancaster@bristolassociates.com; Dnrjet@aol.com; cshurkus@SIKORSKY.COM; sellingsworth@keystonehelicopter.com; bhjet@tmo.blackberry.net; skellen2@nysgmail.com; Helen Kim; JETCARE@aol.com; gmax1@ellmax.com
Subject: Final delivery N908GM S76C++

To All:
Ref: Sikorsky S76C++  N908GM,
I just spoke to Chris Shurkus and Sam Ellingsworth at Sikorsky and the following is "FIRM".
Bill Togher arrives Thursday the 13th to Keystone to start log book acceptance and interior completion.
Bill is our S76 outside source of expertise representing us on the maintenance and record research end.
Darren Rothell and myself will arrive Sunday night Dec. 16th to Keystone.
Interior and Blade tracking will commence next week, including ground runs and tracking without interior installed to get a head start and blade vibrations.
First completed acceptance flight is Dec. 17th. and we expect to Fly away from Keystone Dec. 19 as completed and in service.
Rich Kahn, I would expect our insurance to be in place by Dec 10th to cover our machine, we take full delivery on Dec 17th would be completely our responsibility, after that date. Final moneys will be at Darren Indyke's final approval of completion documents.
Darren Indyke, would you be available to join us later Monday the 17th or Tuesday the 18th for acceptance flights? Chris said he will fwd you completion docs later in the week for your review.
Thank you,
Larry Visoski
